title: DRMYN Studio: Metadata-Only AI-Assisted Movie Development and Production Workflow
description: DRMYN Studio is a metadata-only, schema-validated, human-gated research software framework for AI-assisted movie development and movie production process design, documentation, validation, and reproducibility. The repository records canonical source truth, planning metadata, prompt governance, validation evidence, human approval decisions, agent handoffs, and reproducibility artifacts for an AI-assisted film production workflow. It includes a three-agent autonomous orchestration layer (Claude Code / Codex / Gemini Code Assist) with auto-handoff and pickup mode enabling structured multi-agent coordination without external APIs, a Streamlit dashboard for operator oversight, 20+ JSON Schemas (draft 2020-12), and a Film Aesthetic Bible system for deterministic visual keyword injection into T2I prompts. Generated media outputs are stored externally and referenced through metadata-only records. This v0.17.0 checkpoint formalizes the Element Reference Generation Policy v2: a two-stage Midjourney character reference chain (V8.1 narrative identity followed by V7 Omni Reference refinement), a scale-angle three-view pack replacing directional views (front_reference, three_quarter_medium_reference, three_quarter_close_reference), and non-character element routing through GPT Images 2. The v0.18.0 release adds the Scene Continuity System for Kling 3.0 Omni (O3): a deterministic beat-to-clip packer, a scene continuity ledger for inter-clip (package-to-package) camera/action/screen-direction hand-off, an anti-clone figure roster (one distinct on-screen figure per @alias), a four-view scale-angle character reference policy with full-body look sheets, and a single canonical clip-manifest prompt path (the legacy storyboard layer was removed). Demonstrated through the Closing Price AI-assisted film project.

contributors.name: Parlayandemir Sayan, Gizem
contributors.affiliation: Istanbul University, Radio, Television and Cinema, Istanbul, Turkey
